locator.quote: was the only thing that worked

text: A value-domain check (head(30) on one named runner, reading the timestamps) was the only thing that worked to catch the wrong-tick bug.

locator.quote: Three independent fences failed to catch v1

text: Three independent fences failed to catch v1: the no-lookahead smoke test, the z-score sanity table, and visual review.
time_to_off_s counts BACKWARD (large = far from off), so most-recent = smallest time_to_off_s = iloc[0] under ascending sort.
